chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1319 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 27.08.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Sheroz Sattar, Advocate for the complainant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. PI Khadim Hussain of PS Gizri. ------------------------------- No one is present on behalf of the applicant. Same was the position on last date of hearing. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
